description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and nightly. Use a job matrix to test on ubuntu and macos with Python 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12. For each job, check out the repository, set up micromamba with a specified environment, install the package, run tests with pytest and coverage, and upload coverage to CodeCov if the repository is choderalab/espaloma and the event is a pull request.
